center.name: 薩伊共和國
center.summary: 薩伊共和國是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Black-throated coucal、African black swift、白喉燕等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in Africa discontinuously from Liberia, Cameroon, Zaire, Uganda and Kenya southwards to South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The subspecies found in northern and central Zaire is sometimes split as Neumann's coucal (Centropus neumanni)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the African highlands from Ethiopia and Kenya through Rwanda to eastern Zaire and Malawi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly migratory, wintering in Angola, Zambia and southern Zaire
